prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约6419→6657→6828→7137→6185名，2021–2024年呈逐年后移趋势，累计后移约718名；2025年大幅前移至6185名，较2024年前移 约952名，形成明显反弹。2025年基准约6185名；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2022年均为52人，2023年51人，2024–2025年52人；2026年计划48人，较2025 年减少4人（-7.7%），为近年首次缩招，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第88名，2025年第86名，近年排名在86–102名之 间波动，整体处于中上水平；2025年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风事件（教师性骚扰学生），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音 热度总排名第90位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；药学为A+学科（全国顶尖），是该校核心优势；中药学、临床药学等相关专业依托药学A+学科实力， 在行业内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学类相关专业属于生化环材大类，2024年专业热度评估为一般观望，但药学作为A+学科具有特殊性，报考热 度高于普通生化环材；内蒙古2026年高考总人数约154000人，较2025年约116360人明显增加，物理类考生估算约112420人（较2025年83716人增加约34%），竞争显著加剧；省控线 数据已纳入参考；中国药科大学位于江苏省南京市，非本省高校；该校在内蒙古招生占比约0.5%–1%，属较小规模招生省份，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅反弹至6185名、2026年计划缩招7.7%、本省物理类考生增加约34%三重因素，竞争压力明显上升，预计2026年最低位次将较2025年有所前移（数字减小 ）。预测最低位次约5820名，区间5320–6320名。

- 生物制药（拔尖创新班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5320–6320名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如5300名以内）可重点冲刺药学（杰出药学家实验班）和 药学（拔尖创新班）；位次在区间中段（约5800名）以药学类、临床药学等二档专业为主；位次接近区间上限（约6300名）建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次要求较低的 专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 6419 → 6657 → 6828 → 7137 → 6185. From 2021 to 2024, there was a gradual backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 718 places; in 2025, there was a significant forward shift to 6185, moving forward about 952 places compared to 2024, forming a clear rebound. The baseline for 2025 is about 6185. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 52 in both 2021 and 2022, 51 in 2023, and 52 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 48, a decrease of 4 (-7.7%) from 2025, marking the first reduction in recent years, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings and 86th in 2025, with recent rankings fluctuating between 86 and 102, overall at an upper-middle level; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was slightly negative, involving a teacher sexual harassment incident, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity total ranking is 90th, with an average evaluation, and low exposure on short video platforms; Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), which is the core advantage of the university; related majors such as Chinese Materia Medica and Clinical Pharmacy rely on the strength of the A+ Pharmacy discipline and have high recognition within the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Pharmacy-related majors fall under the broader category of Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials. In 2024, the popularity assessment for these majors was generally wait-and-see, but Pharmacy, as an A+ discipline, has particularity, with application popularity higher than ordinary Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials majors; the total number of college entrance examination takers in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase from about 116,360 in 2025, with an estimated 112,420 Physics Category candidates (an increase of about 34% from 83,716 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition; provincial control score data has been included for reference; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a provincial university; the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 0.5%–1%, making it a small-scale enrollment province, with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the significant rebound in 2025 ranking to 6185, the 7.7% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the approximately 34% increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, competitive pressure has clearly risen. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift forward (smaller number) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5820, with a range of 5320–6320.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Outstanding Pharmacist Experimental Class)
- Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Medicinal Chemistry)
- Clinical Pharmacy
- Biopharmaceuticals
- Chinese Materia Medica (Top Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chinese Materia Medica (Chinese Materia Medica, Chinese Medicinal Resources and Development, Chinese Pharmaceutical Preparations)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering (Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, Environmental Science)
- Biotechnology
- Pharmaceutical Administration
- Biostatistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5320–6320, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 5300), focus on applying for Pharmacy (Outstanding Pharmacist Experimental Class) and Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class); if the ranking is in the middle of the range (about 5800), mainly choose Tier 2 majors such as Pharmacy and Clinical Pharmacy; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (about 6300), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1153 → 1077 → 1864 → 1370 → 1103, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a notable backward shift to 1864, recovering to 1370 in 2024, and further advancing to 1103 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1103. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 2 students each year from 2021 to 2025, but the 2026 plan increases to 6 students, an increase of 4 students (+200%) compared to 2025, marking the first major expansion in recent years with a significant increase in supply.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings and 86th in 2025, with stable rankings in the 86–102 range in recent years. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics and conduct. Its Douyin popularity ranked 90th overall, rated as average, with limited impact on liberal arts students' willingness to apply. Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Economic Management Experimental Class, English) are weakly related to the core pharmaceutical discipline, so the advantage discipline has limited pull on liberal arts applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) belongs to the economics and management category, with a 2024 popularity assessment of differentiation and wait-and-see, moderate popularity. The English major belongs to the foreign language category, with a 2024 assessment of general wait-and-see, low popularity. The total number of Inner Mongolia 2026 college entrance examination candidates is approximately 154,000, with an estimated 43,120 history category candidates (an increase of about 32% from 32,644 in 2025), intensifying competition. China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university. Its liberal arts enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is very small (2–6 students), with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the 2025 ranking advancing to 1103, the 2026 plan significantly expanding by 200% (2→6 students), and the provincial history category candidate increase of about 32%, the expansion effect far outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward (numerical increase). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2397, with a range of 1965–2829.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) (including Business Administration, Health Service and Management, Medical Product Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- No other liberal arts majors reach Tier 2 difficulty.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only two liberal arts enrollment majors. With rankings within the predicted range of 1965–2829, it is recommended to target the Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) as the main goal, with English (Pharmaceutical Direction) as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2000), you can confidently apply for the Economic Management Experimental Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (about 2800), it is recommended to use the English major as a safety.
